---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Use Case / Problem
<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits from this? -->
<!-- Example: "As a user who downloads playlists, I want X so that Y" -->

## 📱 Platform
- [ ] Desktop (Windows)
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Both

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this working. Sketches/mockups welcome. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## ➕ Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or examples. -->
